extraction.one_line_summary: NIBALI Vincenzo soloed to stage victory on the final Val Thorens climb after ALAPHILIPPE cracked 8 miles from summit, losing podium to THOMAS Geraint.
tactical_patterns: NIBALI accelerated in breakaway sub-1min from peloton, betting correctly that GC chaos behind wouldn't organize chase.
ALAPHILIPPE cracked when still 8 miles from summit, suggesting his yellow jersey legs relied on shorter punchy efforts.
INEOS ran KRUIJSWIJK through DE PLUS pacing instead of attacking, prioritizing BERNAL's security over stage hunting.
WOODS' ambiguous role showed team confusion whether to support URAN for GC or chase stage win personally.

rider_signals.ALAPHILIPPE Julian: negative: Lost 12+ seconds and podium when gradients sustained past 8 miles, confirming he's vulnerable on longer alpine ascents
rider_signals.NIBALI Vincenzo: positive: Attacked breakaway with sub-1min gap when most would consolidate, reading peloton chaos correctly for stage win
rider_signals.THOMAS Geraint: neutral: Defended solidly but never attacked despite teammate in yellow, revealing INEOS conservative approach when holding advantage
rider_signals.BARDET Romain: negative: Dropped simultaneously with ALAPHILIPPE, confirming KOM jersey came from breakaways not raw climbing strength
rider_signals.MAS Enric: positive: Waited for struggling teammate ALAPHILIPPE mid-climb, showing team loyalty overrode personal GC ambitions
rider_signals.DE PLUS Laurens: positive: Paced full climb for KRUIJSWIJK/BORAH despite no GC podium chance, demonstrating domestique commitment depth
